# NBC Custody Battles & Marc Rowan Origins

**Source:** inputs/saved_html/NBC Custody Battles & Marc Rowan Origins_Thu,_21_Nov_2024_21-02-09_+0000_19350886ce6ca036.html
**Processed:** 2025-08-24T19:12:05.389362

Roberts’ Spinco Bombshell, More ELC Drama, TNT’s Consolation Prize
 ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌

| |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  | | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | | |  | | --- | | [View email in browser](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dUVUlaNHNfZVR0ZFM0ZDVOVjVEcz0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wdWNrLm5ld3MvbmV3c2xldHRlcl9hcmNoaXZlcy90aGUtZGFpbHktY291cmFudC8_) | | [The Daily Courant](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dUVUlaNHNfZVR0ZFM0ZDVOVjVEcz0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wdWNrLm5ld3MvbmV3c2xldHRlcl9hcmNoaXZlcy90aGUtZGFpbHktY291cmFudC8_) | | [The Daily Courant](https://email.puck.) | | |  | | --- | | **Roberts’ Spinco Bombshell, More ELC Drama, TNT’s Consolation Prize** | | Welcome back to The Daily Courant, your afternoon download of Puck’s best new reporting.     First up today, **Dylan Byers** unearths the *real* motive behind **Joe Scarborough** and **Mika Brzezinski** ’s pilgrimage to Mar-a-Lago, a cable news micro-drama that has shaken the *Morning Joe* faithful. Then Dylan chronicles the agita inside 30 Rock after Comcast’s **Brian Roberts** announced that NBC and MSNBC will be getting a corporate divorce.     Plus, below the fold: **Rachel Strugatz** breaks the news of an executive shake-up at Estée Lauder. **Abby Livingston** and Senator-elect **Elissa Slotkin** discuss why U.S. intelligence officers are worried about **Tulsi Gabbard** . **Bill Cohan** charts the bildungsroman of Apollo’s **Marc Rowan** , a dark horse for treasury secretary. On *The Town* , **Matt Belloni** and **Bill Simmons** dissect the bittersweet NBA-TNT divorce. And on *The Powers That Be* , Dylan joins **Peter Hamby** to consider what the Comcast spinoff means for the future of TV under **Trump** 2.0.     *P.S.* : Our [Annual Guide to Mirth & Merriment is back](https://email.puck.) ! Join Puck’s superstar journalists (and a few V.I.P. friends) on a magical, shoppable journey through everything we’re not-so-secretly coveting this holiday season: Belloni’s golf-cart alternative; **The Mooch** ’s favorite “man soap”; **Marc Jacobs** ’ go-to stocking stuffer, and much, much more... | |  | | [Mika & Joe’s Excellent Adventure](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dUVUlaNHNfZVR0ZFM0ZDVOVjVEcz0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wdWNrLm5ld3MvbWlrYS1icnplemluc2tpLWpvZS1zY2FyYm9yb3VnaHMtZXhjZWxsZW50LWFkdmVudHVyZS8_) | | DYLAN BYERS | | News and notes on the real ulterior motive behind the Mar-a-Lago pilgrimage. Plus, all the nail-biting and agita unleashed at 30 Rock in the wake of the Comcast spinco news. | | | |  | | --- | | **A MESSAGE FROM OUR SPONSOR** | |  | |  | | | |  | | --- | |  | | [Ordinary People](https://email.puck.) | | RACHEL STRUGATZ | | Deciem—and particularly its top brand, The Ordinary—was never a cookie-cutter Lauder business. Now, Nicola Kilner, the C.E.O. credited with holding it all together, is departing, and the company is feeling the growing pains. | |  | | [About Tulsi Gabbard…](https://email.puck.) | | ABBY LIVINGSTON | | Senator-elect Elissa Slotkin worked for the C.I.A., the Pentagon, and the Department of Defense. And she’s seen enough to have some legitimate fears about the woman Trump wants to oversee U.S. intelligence. | |  | | [Apollo Lands in Washington](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dUVUlaNHNfZVR0ZFM0ZDVOVjVEcz0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wdWNrLm5ld3MvYXBvbGxvcy1tYXJjLXJvd2FuLWdvZXMtdG8td2FzaGluZ3Rvbi8_) | | WILLIAM D. COHAN | | As Apollo C.E.O. Marc Rowan prepares to meet with Trump over the Treasury job, a bildungsroman of his professional and deal career—from parking cars at the Diplomat Hotel to big mergers for junk bond casualty Drexel Burnham—and his reflections from our many conversations over the past years and days. | | | |  | | --- | |  | |  | | | |  | | --- | |  | | [Secrets of the NBA-TNT Divorce Settlement, With Bill Simmons](https://email.puck.) | | MATTHEW BELLONI | | Matt is joined by The Ringer’s Bill Simmons to talk about the painful split between the NBA and Turner after a 30-year partnership. They discuss why the relationship blew up, details and questions surrounding the move of popular studio show ‘Inside the NBA’ to ESPN, and the chances that this will work out for Warner Discovery C.E.O. David Zaslav in the long run. | | | |  | | --- | |  | | [Brian Roberts’ Seismic Spinoff](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dUVUlaNHNfZVR0ZFM0ZDVOVjVEcz0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wdWNrLm5ld3MvcG9kY2FzdF9lcGlzb2RlL2JyaWFuLXJvYmVydHMtc2Vpc21pYy1zcGluLW9mZi8_) | | PETER HAMBY & DYLAN BYERS | | Dylan Byers joins Peter to decipher Brian Roberts’ decision to spin off NBCUniversal’s declining cable assets and explain why this is a landmark moment in the history of the media industry. Then Dylan offers a behind-the-scenes snapshot of Joe and Mika's recent pilgrimage to Mar-a-Lago. | | | |  | | --- | |  | | [Puck’s 2024 Guide to Mirth & Merriment](https://email.puck.) | | THE EDITORS | | The fourth annual edition of our definitive, nondenominational holiday gift guide, featuring a handful of surprise V.I.P. guests… | | | |  | | --- | | [Puck](https://email.puck.) | | |  |  |  |  | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | [Facebook](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dUVUlaNHNfZVR0ZFM0ZDVOVjVEcz0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9mYWNlYm9vay5jb20vcHVja2RvdG5ld3M_) | [Twitter](https://email.puck.) | [Instagram](https://email.puck.) | [LinkedIn](https://email.puck.) | | | |  | | --- | | Need help?
